MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The OSC is re-set to 11/15/01 at 1:30 PM, in dept. 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

Order To Show Cause, Calendar Motion: Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Gary A. Kessler, Esq., and David V. Roth, Esq., for failure to appear at the July 23, 2001 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference is heard this day.
Robert Ressner, Esq., specially appearing for plaintiff's counsel. David Roth, Esq., appearing for defendat. After argument of counsel court ordered Orders to Show Cause dissolved and off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)
